categories.description: Answers, explains, or challenges a developer request.
Not applicable in the final taxonomy: team membership requires at least event-driven participation in shared work.
Not applicable: managerial work requires at least event-driven initiative.
Raises questions in response to observed events such as failed builds or ambiguous requirements.
Coordinates with humans when repository, issue-tracker, CI, or other workflow events occur.
Supervises predefined workflows by reacting to project events.
Initiates clarification or challenge before being asked.
Acts as an autonomous development partner monitoring artifacts, proposing changes, and coordinating with humans.
Plans, prioritizes, allocates resources, and monitors quality under governance constraints.

refinement_note: Passive Team-member was included as an initial boundary case but removed after expert feedback. The final taxonomy treats passive on-demand support as tool use rather than team membership.
